beat: Emberfox Ashen Hide + Ashwing Kindled Spirit
artPrompt: Two-panel page, no text. Left: Emberfox flares Ashen Hide against cold Fracture wind. Right: Ashwing (ember-feathered avian) Kindled Spirit dive-assist over mud plaza. Official silhouettes. Original Riftwilds IP only. NO dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, or UI in the image.

lines.text: Heat that guards. Fire that listens.

lines.speaker: Elara Venn
lines.text: None of you are weapons. You are the reason weapons can wait.
